subject: AUM growth outreach, {{firstName}}
body:
Hey {{firstName}},

I came across {{companyName}} while researching independent RIAs in the area and wanted to reach out directly.

I started ArgusReach to help advisors build a more consistent pipeline of qualified prospects — specifically the attorneys, CPAs, and executives who match your ideal client profile but haven't heard of you yet.

We handle the prospecting: identifying the right contacts, writing personalized outreach in your voice, and managing every reply. When someone is interested in learning more about your approach, they book directly on your calendar. You only get involved when the conversation is already warm.

Worth a quick 30-minute call to see if it makes sense for {{companyName}}?

calendly.com/vito-argusreach/30min

Vito Resciniti
Founder, ArgusReach

subject: re: AUM growth outreach, {{firstName}}
body:
Hey {{firstName}},

Following up on my note from last week.

Most advisors I talk to have a similar situation: strong retention, solid performance, and no scalable way to reach new qualified prospects beyond referrals. We bridge that gap — consistent outreach to your target market, managed entirely by us.

Here's how it works: we build a targeted contact list, write outreach in your voice, and manage every response. You only hear from us when someone wants to connect — they book on your calendar directly.

Happy to walk you through it in 30 minutes:

calendly.com/vito-argusreach/30min

Vito Resciniti
Founder, ArgusReach

subject: last note — {{companyName}}
body:
Hey {{firstName}},

Last one from me.

If building a more consistent pipeline of qualified prospects is on your radar this year, I'd love to show you how we do it for other advisors. Takes 30 minutes.

If the timing isn't right, no worries — just reply and I'll leave you alone.

calendly.com/vito-argusreach/30min

Vito Resciniti
Founder, ArgusReach
